command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Remove the phantom assignment for S0412 (BI001356 doesn't exist, clean it up)
DELETE FROM service_billing_assignments WHERE serviceExternalId = 'S0412';

-- Assign ABB Internet (S0412) to BI00018
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, assignmentBucket)
VALUES ('BI00018', 'S0412', 'C2753', 'system', 'auto', 'standard');

-- Assign Vocus SIM (S6950) to BI00018
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, assignmentBucket)
VALUES ('BI00018', 'S6950', 'C2753', 'system', 'auto', 'standard')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE billingItemExternalId = 'BI00018';

-- Tag the billing item as retail bundle
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = 'bundle' WHERE externalId = 'BI00018';

-- Verify the final state
SELECT sba.serviceExternalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, sba.billingItemExternalId
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId = 'BI00018';

rows.planName: SmileTel supplied NBN voice and internet bundle. 24 month plan. Includes:- 1xVoice phone line,1xInternet service,1x4G Back-up, S
